data.text/markdown:
Notebook 2.1 — Toy Model

Minimal PyPSA toy model for the Stage 2 complexity ladder. This notebook currently preserves the original Step 1 setup: one bus, four thermal generators, flat demand, and a single solve.

data.text/html: Solve status: ok Termination condition: optimalThe merit-order outcome is the key result here: brown coal fills first, black coal sets the marginal unit, and gas never enters because demand never rises above 8,000 MW.
